name: HRC_DL_UI_BUS_OBJECTS_VL
query: SELECT B.UI_BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID , B.UI_BUSINESS_OBJECT_GUID , B.MODULE_ID , B.CREATED_BY , B.CREATION_DATE , B.LAST_UPDATED_BY , B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE , B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN , B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER , B.ENTERPRISE_ID, T.UI_NAME , T.UI_DESCRIPTION FROM HRC_DL_UI_BUS_OBJECTS_B B , HRC_DL_UI_BUS_OBJECTS_TL T WHERE B.UI_BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID = T.UI_BUSINESS_OBJECT_ID AND T.LANGUAGE = userenv('LANG')
